(tabs)/chat.title: Chat
(tabs)/chat.description: Try: go to profile, tap settings... (text-input), Send (button)

(tabs)/settings.title: Settings
(tabs)/settings.description: Notifications (button), Appearance (button), Language (button), About (button), Privacy Policy (button)

(tabs)/two.title: Profile
(tabs)/two.description: Edit Profile (button), Favorites (button), Order History (button), Saved Addresses (button)

invite-friends.description: Copy Code (button), Friend's email address (text-input), 📤 Share via Other Apps (button)

item/[id].title: Item Details
item/[id].description: Add to Wishlist (switch), View Reviews & Questions (button), Add to Cart (button)

item-reviews/[id].title: Reviews
item-reviews/[id].description: ✍️ Write a Review (button), Price Drop Alerts (switch), Notify on New Reviews (switch), Type your question about this product... (text-input), Submit Question (button)

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Push Notifications (switch), Email Notifications (switch), SMS Notifications (switch), Deal Alerts (switch)

review-thanks/[id].description: View Rewards Program (button), Back to Reviews (button)

rewards.description: New Reward Opportunities (switch), Weekly Exclusive Deals (switch), Milestone Alerts (switch), 👥 (button)

write-review/[id].description: Summarize your experience (text-input), What did you like or dislike? How do you use this product? (text-input), 👍 Yes (button), 👎 No (button), Submit Review (button)
